 {"id":"beads_rust-f8e","title":"--no-db mode (JSONL-only operation)","description":"# --no-db Mode (JSONL-only operation)

## Purpose
Support classic `--no-db` mode: operate on JSONL without SQLite. This is required for environments where DB is unavailable or undesired.

## Behavior
- Use in-memory storage populated from JSONL.
- Locate JSONL via `BEADS_DIR` / `.beads/issues.jsonl` discovery rules.
- Prefix detection order:
  1) `issue-prefix` in config.yaml
  2) common prefix across JSONL IDs
  3) directory name fallback
- Mixed prefixes => error (must set explicit config).
- At command exit, **write JSONL atomically** (issues only; no ephemerals/wisps).

## Constraints
- No daemon, no SQLite-only features.
- Some commands may be limited (e.g., stats that require SQL aggregates).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Commands operate read/write against JSONL only.
- Atomic write on exit with correct filtering.
- Prefix detection/validation matches bd.

## Tests
- No-db mode read/write with JSONL fixture.
- Mixed prefix error path.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BlackBeaver","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:18:01.415593364Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T00:18:22.523866190Z","closed_at":"2026-01-18T00:18:22.523866190Z","close_reason":"Verified --no-db implementation + e2e_no_db tests pass","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"compacted_at_commit":"","original_size":0}

 {"id":"beads_rust-fdjo","title":"Refresh README footprint and minimality claims against current scope","description":"Reality-check finding: README.md still says br is about 20K lines of Rust and emphasizes a minimal footprint, but the current repository has roughly 94K Rust lines under src/ and about 195K Rust lines including tests/benches, plus substantial release-note scope around routing, recovery, MCP, TOON, history, lint, and conformance. Acceptance: update the README positioning to reflect the current mature CLI surface without over-promising minimalism, or remove volatile line-count comparisons.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MistyDune","created_at":"2026-04-21T20:06:21.626117999Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T21:29:24.021296128Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T21:29:24.021023526Z","close_reason":"Removed stale README LOC/minimality claims and updated positioning for current CLI scope","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","readme","reality-check"],"comments":[{"id":284,"issue_id":"beads_rust-fdjo","author":"MistyDune","text":"degraded-coordination: Agent Mail health is red; reserving README.md by bead comment and avoiding claimed CLI_REFERENCE work for 6azu.","created_at":"2026-04-21T21:28:31Z"}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-fmxd","title":"E2E tests: defer/undefer commands","description":"# E2E Tests for \`defer\` and \`undefer\` Commands

## Overview
The defer/undefer commands manage issue scheduling by setting/clearing \`status=deferred\` and \`defer_until\` timestamp.

## Commands to Test
- \`br defer <id>\` - Defer issue indefinitely
- \`br defer <id> --until <time>\` - Defer until specific time
- \`br defer <id1> <id2>\` - Defer multiple issues
- \`br undefer <id>\` - Undefer (set status=open)
- \`br undefer <id1> <id2>\` - Undefer multiple

## Test Cases

### Defer Basic (5 tests)
1. **defer_sets_status_deferred** - Status changes to deferred
2. **defer_indefinitely_no_until** - No defer_until when no --until
3. **defer_with_until_timestamp** - defer_until set correctly
4. **defer_multiple_issues** - All issues deferred
5. **defer_json_output** - JSON shows updated issue

### Natural Time Parsing (6 tests)
6. **defer_until_tomorrow** - \`--until tomorrow\` works
7. **defer_until_relative** - \`--until +1h\` works
8. **defer_until_specific_date** - \`--until 2026-02-01\` works
9. **defer_until_datetime** - \`--until "2026-02-01 09:00"\` works
10. **defer_until_past_warning** - Past date warns but allows
11. **defer_until_invalid_error** - Invalid time format errors

### Undefer (4 tests)
12. **undefer_sets_status_open** - Status changes to open
13. **undefer_clears_defer_until** - defer_until becomes null
14. **undefer_multiple_issues** - All issues undeferred
15. **undefer_json_output** - JSON shows updated issue

### Edge Cases (4 tests)
16. **defer_already_deferred** - Idempotent, updates defer_until
17. **undefer_already_open** - No-op, no error
18. **defer_closed_issue_error** - Cannot defer closed issue
19. **defer_nonexistent_error** - Unknown ID errors

### Ready/Blocked Interaction (3 tests)
20. **deferred_not_in_ready** - Deferred issues excluded from ready
21. **deferred_not_blocked** - Deferred != blocked
22. **undefer_appears_in_ready** - Undeferred issue shows in ready

## Logging Requirements
- Log each defer/undefer action
- Log time parsing results
- Log status transitions
- Log any validation errors

## Test File Structure
\`\`\`
tests/e2e_defer.rs
├── mod defer_basic_tests (5)
├── mod defer_time_parsing_tests (6)
├── mod undefer_tests (4)
├── mod defer_edge_cases (4)
└── mod defer_ready_interaction (3)
\`\`\`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file: tests/e2e_defer.rs
- [ ] 22 test functions minimum
- [ ] Natural time parsing coverage
- [ ] ready/blocked interaction verified","notes":"2026-01-18: Ran cargo test --test e2e_defer; 22/22 passing. Close blocked by beads_rust-oxmd; requested unblock.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"LavenderWaterfall","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T16:19:08.288701602Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T01:09:53.212345166Z","closed_at":"2026-01-18T01:09:53.212345166Z","close_reason":"E2E defer/undefer tests complete (22/22 passing)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":120,"issue_id":"beads_rust-fmxd","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Verified tests/e2e_defer.rs: 22 #[test] cases with logging, time parsing, ready/blocked interactions. Attempted close, but blocked by parent beads_rust-oxmd; leaving open pending parent.","created_at":"2026-01-18T00:41:49Z"},{"id":121,"issue_id":"beads_rust-fmxd","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Re-ran on 2026-01-18: cargo test --test e2e_defer -- --nocapture => 22/22 passing; previous failures not reproduced.","created_at":"2026-01-18T00:50:34Z"}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-g1ig","title":"Conformance: human-readable output parity (text)","description":"Compare bd vs br text output for stable commands and normalize color/whitespace.

Scope
- Commands: list/show/ready/blocked/stats/changelog/orphans (and any others with stable text).
- Strip ANSI colors, normalize whitespace/line endings, and compare output.
- Record diffs with context in artifacts.

Acceptance
- Parity checks run in conformance mode with clear diffs on failure.
- Uses same normalization rules as golden snapshots.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Opus-4.5","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-18T03:55:39.591665011Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T06:06:45.158947364Z","closed_at":"2026-01-18T06:06:45.158947364Z","close_reason":"Conformance tests implemented in tests/conformance_text_output.rs. Tests identify key differences: empty list messages, issue format ([P2] [task] vs [● P2] [task] -), section headers (Ready to work vs 📋 Ready work), field labels, and exit codes for not-found cases.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"beads_rust-g1ig","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-ag35","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"beads_rust-g1ig","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-bfgw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"beads_rust-g1ig","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-hdc0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"beads_rust-g1ig","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-lsht","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"beads_rust-g1ig","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-r23m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
